missing_keywords: proficiency in Excel (already matched as Advanced Excel)
marketing analytics platforms (Salesforce noted but other ad platforms missing)
strengths: Strong SQL and database skills (PostgreSQL, MySQL, BigQuery)
Proficient in Python and R for analysis and ETL
Experienced in visualization (Tableau, Power BI) with quantified impact
Practical experience building ETL pipelines and data models
Demonstrated measurable outcomes (reduced time, improved acquisition)
weaknesses: Limited direct experience with paid search/display ad platforms (Google/Bing/Facebook)
No explicit A/B testing or experimentation mention
Sparse exposure to SAS/SPSS/VBA or enterprise statistical packages
Machine learning experience not clearly demonstrated
improvement_bullets: Developed predictive models and performed A/B testing on marketing campaign performance to optimize customer acquisition strategies, resulting in a 300% increase in new customer growth.
Built and automated complex ETL pipelines to integrate data from Facebook, Google Ads, and Salesforce, ensuring real-time reporting for campaign measurement and performance optimization.
Applied advanced machine learning techniques in Python, including regression and classification models, to analyze loan portfolio risk and support high-stakes business decision-making.
Translated complex operational and marketing datasets into strategic insights by leveraging advanced statistical analysis and modeling techniques to identify growth opportunities.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design data-driven experiments, utilizing SQL and Python to analyze search and display ad performance metrics for continuous campaign improvement.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst (Bangkok Based, relocation provided) opportunity with Agoda. I am interested in this opportunity because Agoda’s commitment to using data and technology as the heart of its culture aligns perfectly with my analytical background and passion for building data-driven travel solutions. What interests me about working for Agoda is its global footprint and its focus on innovative experimentation which inspires me because I thrive in fast-paced environments where data informs every business decision. I believe my advanced data modeling skills and my technical proficiency in Python and SQL would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on operational efficiency and actionable insights. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in our customer acquisition process and used time series modeling to segment our audience, which contributed to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at Agoda would allow me to bring my modeling expertise to optimize marketing campaigns and experiment structures. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my database and ETL pipeline skills. I collaborated with product and underwriting teams to integrate data from APIs and PostgreSQL, streamlining project delivery by 25%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in campaign measurement and data visualization in working on search and display ad optimization at Agoda. I know that my technical versatility and analytical mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
